original:
Ecommerce can be art too

[Outpace Studios post — adapting format: 1-line reframe + product visual. Made 142 likes, 9.8K views.]

versions.label: A
versions.rationale: Direct parallel to the original's format. 5 words. The 'too' implies the category wasn't expected to be beautiful — that's the whole contradiction. Works as a caption for any design showcase visual.

versions.label: B
versions.text: Most SaaS looks like it was built to work, not to be opened. We design for both.
versions.rationale: Opens on a specific category observation (Rule 5), then lands on what Bricx does differently. Reader infers the quality — we don't claim it (Rule 2). Works with a before/after UI visual.

versions.label: C
versions.text: Enterprise software doesn't have to look like a compliance form.
versions.rationale: Sharpest concrete detail in the hook (Rule 19) — 'compliance form' is the exact thing every B2B founder fears their product looks like. Contradiction without explaining it. Let the visual do the rest.
